items.title: ML lifecycle: learn from data then infer
items.mermaid:
flowchart LR
  rawData["raw data"] --> features["feature extraction"]
  features --> trainData["training set"]
  trainData --> learn["learning algorithm"]
  learn --> params["learned parameters"]
  params --> model["trained model"]
  newInput["new input"] --> model
  model --> prediction["prediction / action"]
items.caption: Training induces parameters from data; inference applies the trained model to inputs the system has not seen before.

items.title: ML within the AI landscape
items.mermaid:
flowchart TB
  ai["Artificial Intelligence"] --> ml["Machine Learning"]
  ml --> supervised["Supervised learning"]
  ml --> unsupervised["Unsupervised learning"]
  ml --> rl["Reinforcement learning"]
  ml --> dl["Deep Learning"]
  dl --> genai["Generative AI"]
items.caption: Machine learning is a major branch of AI; deep learning and generative AI are specialized ML approaches covered in sibling topics.
